title: I Got My Memories From My Past Life Back!
overview: A Japanese man who likes cooking and sewing is reborn as a chubby noble child.

title: My First Time Meeting My Brother
overview: Ageha meets his young brother Regulus for the first time, and learns about his family.

title: The Kikunoi Family's Circumstances
overview: Ageha is forced to confront his family's ugliness.

title: I Made Origami for My Brother, and Chawan-Mushi for Me
overview: Ageha makes him and his brother special things that remind him of his old home.

title: I Don't Think I'm Going to Live a Long Life
overview: Ageha tries to think of ways he can help foster Regulus's education.

title: My Embroidery Sold
overview: Ageha takes a trip into town for the first time.

title: Using Magic to Visit the Capital
overview: Ageha takes a trip to the capital and meets two musicians.

title: H-Hello! It's an Honor to Meet You!
overview: Ageha meets another god, one who has a lot to say to him.

title: The Greatest Singer in the Empire Is Born!
overview: Ageha goes to see Maria's performance in the capital.

title: My Heart Is Full of Teachings and Sincerity
overview: Ageha's family is concerned about his well-being and would like him to enjoy his childhood more.

title: I Made a Friend
overview: Ageha makes his first friend in his new life.

title: I'll Use My Memories from a Past Life to Make a Business Deal
overview: Ageha comes up with a big plan to bring prosperity to the Kikunoi lands.
